column1: Fire Safe Cleaning|https://firesafecleaning.com/|https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Fire+Safe+Cleaning+Spokane+WA|Spokane|Spokane and nearby Eastern Washington commercial kitchens|Matthew Shelby|matthew.shelby@firesafecleaning.com|509-844-4976|Google Maps discovery backed by the official site, where founder Matthew Shelby presents Fire Safe Cleaning as a locally owned Spokane operator focused on commercial hood cleaning and kitchen exhaust services with before-and-after proof, direct company email, and code-compliant service for restaurants and small businesses.

A Plus Fire & Hoods|https://aplushoods.com/|https://content.boston.gov/sites/default/files/file/2026/03/2026%20Registered%20Hood%20Cleaners.pdf|Boston|Boston, Southern New Hampshire, and broader New England commercial kitchens||contact@aplushoods.com|888-410-4650|Boston's 2026 registered hood cleaners list includes A Plus Fire and Hoods, and the official site says it serves New England with commercial kitchen exhaust hood cleaning, bare-metal cleaning, and NFPA 96 compliant service while exposing a direct public inbox and phone.

GNS Ventilation LLC|https://www.gnsventilation.com/|https://www.nashuanh.gov/1496/Commercial-Kitchen-Hood-Cleaning|Lowell|Lowell, Nashua, and nearby Merrimack Valley commercial kitchens||contact@gnsventilation.com|978-770-8521|Nashua's 2026 approved commercial hood cleaning page lists GNS Ventilation LLC, and the official site publishes a direct public inbox while stating that GNS Ventilation technicians are trained per NFPA 96 standards.

Tom's Hood Cleaning LLC|https://tomshoodcleaning.com/|https://tomshoodcleaning.com/about/|Lawrence|Greater Boston, Southern New Hampshire, and southern Maine commercial kitchens|Tom Whalen, Sr.|tomshoodcleaning@yahoo.com|978-519-2814|Tom's Hood Cleaning's official about page says Tom Whalen Sr. is the owner-operator of a family-run business serving New England with commercial hood cleaning, lists IKECA and Boston Fire Department certification, and publishes a direct public Yahoo inbox and phone.

Andes Hood Cleaning Inc|https://andeshoodcleaning.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking-precipitator.pdf|New York City|Queens, Brooklyn, Manhattan, and broader New York City commercial kitchens|Manny Chimbay|andeshoodcleaning@gmail.com|347-788-7549|FDNY's approved commercial cooking precipitator list includes Andes Hood Cleaning Inc in Richmond Hill, and the official site presents Andes as a former technician-led kitchen exhaust cleaning company serving restaurants across New York City with FDNY-certified cleaning and a direct public Gmail.

On Time Hood Cleaning Inc|https://ontimehood.com/|https://ontimehood.com/contact.php|Brooklyn|Brooklyn and broader New York City commercial kitchens||service@ontimehood.com|347-762-3607|The official contact page publishes a direct public inbox and Brooklyn phone, and the site positions On Time Hood as a kitchen hood cleaning operator whose licensed technicians keep commercial kitchens clean, airy, and compliant with city and state regulations.
